posts.text: In his first interview since Anthropic was labelled a supply-chain risk, Dario Amodei apologised for the way he handled a crisis that he described as one of the most “disorienting” in the firm’s history. Watch his full Insider interview Friday at 6pm London time https://www.economist.com/business/2026/03/06/anthropics-boss-apologises-but-vows-to-sue-the-pentagon?taid=69aa5aa5aa05b900012ae5a1&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Investor positioning in the options market is extremely bearish:

The S&P 500's 3-month put-call skew is up to ~0.50, near the highest in 3 years.

Put-call skew measures how much more expensive put options are relative to call options, with higher readings signaling greater investor fear.

By comparison, the average 3-month single-stock put-call skew is up to ~0.15, the highest since August.

Furthermore, the S&P 500's 1-month skew is up to ~0.53, the highest since the 2022 bear market.

This nearly matches the levels seen during the 2020 pandemic crash of ~0.56.

Is Wall Street getting overly bearish?
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: It finally happened-my personal move 37 or more. I am deeply impressed. The solution is very nice, clean, and feels almost human. While testing new models in the last few weeks, I felt this coming, but it's an eerie feeling to see an algorithm solve a task one has curated for about 20 years. But at least I have gained a tool that understands my idea on par with the top experts in the field. And I am now working on a completely new level. My singularity has just happened… and there is life on the other side, off to infinity!
posts.author: BambroughKevin
